messages.content:
edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
Before the competitors enter into the ring, I ask the
hostess, “Have you heard about the dangerous pandemic
virus that prevalent in the area, which may cause people
stroke?”
She says, “No,” and then recalls that one of her
colleagues, a veterinarian at the animal park, told her that
today their three winged-goats strangely died this afternoon.
“And then he asked her the same question about the
pandemic virus.”
I continue, “I do not know much about the virus, I just
heard the news on the local radio, but if it is true and it is an
epidemic, it is a disaster.”

Before the competitors step into the ring, I inquire of the hostess, "Have you been made aware of the prevalent and perilous pandemic virus that has struck this area, known to trigger strokes in individuals?"

She responds with a shake of her head, admitting that earlier in the day, she was informed by a colleague, a veterinarian at the animal park, about the sudden and peculiar demise of three winged-goats.

"Curiously enough," she adds, "he also raised the matter of this very pandemic virus."

Pressing on, I admit, "I possess limited knowledge regarding the specifics of this virus. Merely caught wind of it through the local radio. However, if the reports are true and this truly is an epidemic, it would undoubtedly amount to a calamity."

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
Of course, I knew very well that the death in the animal
park was not due to a virus or accidental.
Persian Special Police Force has camped in a region in
the vicinity of the complex from the start of the mission.
Persian spy drones have focused powerful microwaves on
some animals of the park, and they have deliberately
anesthetized them for several hours. On the other hand, Ali
has marked all the vital installations, management office,
human organ distribution center, power station, and
guardhouses by installing xenon bulbs on the streetlights.
The competitors enter the ring and start growling at each
other before the fight begins officially.

I was acutely aware that the death of those creatures within the animal park bore no relation to a mere virus outbreak or unforeseen accidents. Reasons far more sinister lay at the heart of this anomaly.

From the inception of our ambitious mission, the Persian Special Police Force had established their encampment within close proximity of the complex. Utilizing their advanced spy drones, equipped with formidable microwaves, they purposefully subjected select park animals to a calculated and prolonged anesthesia. Meanwhile, Ali, ever resourceful, had meticulously marked all the critical installations - the nerve center, the distribution hub for human organs, the power station, and even the vigilant guardhouses - employing xenon bulbs adorning the streetlights.

As the competitors finally entered the ring, the air was tinged with a prelude of aggression. Their growls echoed, resplendent with the promise of the impending battle, prior to the official commencement.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
I have turned on my camera and transmitters many
times during the previous tours, and nothing happened, or
no one identified me.
Unfortunately, there is a capable tracking system in this
club. And as soon as I turn on my camera, the guards find
me. Then, a guard approaches me and whispers in my ear,
“Please come to the office with me.”

Throughout numerous previous tours, I had brazenly activated my camera and transmitters, without any repercussions or detection. It seemed as though I had successfully remained incognito.

However, my daring exploits were destined to come to an abrupt halt within the confines of this particular club. Unbeknownst to me, a formidable tracking system lurked within its walls. The moment my camera flickered to life, alerting the ever-vigilant guards, my cover was blown. One of the guards, his approach subtly clandestine, sidled up to me and whispered slyly into my ear, "Kindly join me in the office."

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
I look at my watch and know, that drones are coming to
target some major installations and centers. And their top
priorities are targeting clubs where the crowd is there and at
the same time the power station of the complex.
So, I don’t pay much attention to the guard, and when
he insists, I shout confidently, “I told you before!”
Other rich people in the same row also protest against
the guard, “Go away, get lost, you are blocking our view.”

Glancing at my watch, a surge of realization courses through me. The imminent arrival of drones, cloaked with sinister intent, gnaws at my consciousness. Their primary objectives? The clubhouses teeming with throngs of revelers and the pulsing heart of the entire complex - its power station.

Averting my focus from the persistent guard's persistent pleas, I nonchalantly shout with unwavering confidence, "Haven't I made myself abundantly clear already?"

Echoes of disgruntled voices cascade through the row of affluent spectators, their disdain for the guard echoing my own sentiments. "Disappear!" they chime in unison, "Cease obstructing our view and vanish from our sight!"

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
Simultaneously, the competition begins, but before the
fighters get into a fight, one of them suddenly falls in front
of the other like a dead, motionless.
The hostess suddenly screams virus, virus. And at the
same time, all the lights go out. These are drones firing a
focused microwave at the power plant and crowded areas as
preplanned.
While some older people are still sitting in their chairs
and wondering what is happening, the crowd is rushing out
of the club and are shouting, “Virus, virus!”
The management turns the emergency lights on, but
they go off again.
A few minutes later, all the resort complex passengers
are horrified and flee toward their cars in the parking lots,
space cars, or the airport.

As the competition erupts into action, the fighters poised to clash head-on, a sudden and inexplicable phenomenon unfolds before them. One combatant collapses abruptly, lifeless and void of movement, right before the startled eyes of the other.

In that very moment, the hostess unleashes an ear-shattering scream, her voice piercing the air like a siren of dread. In sync with her terrified cry, the entire place plunges into darkness. A premeditated plan unfurls as the drones, hidden in the shadows, unleash a focused barrage of microwaves upon the power plant and densely populated areas.

While a few bewildered elders remain firmly planted in their seats, grappling with the confusion at hand, the majority of the crowd surges forth, propelled by panic and a chorus of frantic shouts, "Virus! Virus!"

Frantic attempts by management ensue, as emergency lights flicker into existence only to be snuffed out once again, leaving the scene shrouded in an eerie gloom. With each passing minute, the horrified patrons of the resort complex are overcome by an overwhelming terror, their instincts propelling them towards the safety of their vehicles in the sprawling parking lots, the sleek space cars, or even the nearby airport, seeking escape from the encroaching chaos.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
But the truth is that there was no virus, and nobody has
died, but they have been stunned unconscious and will
recover and conscious after 5 or 6 hours later.
Some personnel of the hospital, guards, and even from
management also get hit by the waves. And some others are
too scared and are running with other passengers out to the
parking lots.
People have almost evacuated the complex and there is
chaos everywhere. Apart from the senior managers, a few
staff members of the human organ distribution center, some
guards, and a few of the power plant crew who are stunned
or unwilling to leave the area, no one else has remained in
the complex.

However, the grim reality reveals that no one has actually succumbed to a deadly virus. Instead, they have fallen victim to a stunning wave that has rendered them unconscious, a temporary state from which they will gradually awaken after five or six hours have passed.

Unforeseen collateral damage ensues as the waves affect not only the attendees but also select members of the hospital staff, security personnel, and individuals from the management itself. Fear takes root within the hearts of some, compelling them to join the frantic throngs of passengers fleeing towards the safety of the parking lots.

The mass exodus from the complex has transformed it into a symphony of chaotic turmoil. As the crowd dissipates, only a handful of senior managers, select staff members from the enigmatic human organ distribution center, a determined group of guards, and a few tenacious power plant crew members remain - either stunned into inaction or refusing to abandon their posts, rendering the once vibrant complex eerily vacant.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
In a matter of minutes, the Persian troops pour from the
air and land, invading the complex.
Guards are still chasing us. As I am pulling the hostess
from the back, we are running fast and trying to get lost in
the crowd. When the number of guards that are following
us increases to three or five, Persian soldiers immediately
find us with signals sent to the headquarters.
Ali and the electronic department personnel of the
power station want to flee but the guard who is stationed
there, shouts, “Nobody goes anywhere until I tell you.” Ali
starts to clash with the guard, but he gets shot in the arm. At
the same time, other of his colleagues try to arrest the guard,
but he gets killed in the conflict.
Some Persian special forces are fighting the guards, and
at the same time, another group seizes all the documents and
arrests senior executives and some key personnel of the
compound.

Within mere moments, an insidious invasion descends upon the complex as Persian troops materialize from the skies and make their presence known, setting off a frenzy of chaos and panic.

The relentless pursuit of the guards persists, prompting me to fiercely tug the hostess by the arm, our pace quickened as we attempt to blend into the swirling sea of fleeing patrons. However, as the number of guards tailing our every move swells to three or five, the assailant's affiliation with the Persian soldiers becomes distressingly apparent. Covert signals are deftly dispatched to headquarters, tracking our path with chilling accuracy.

Ali, his heart awash with desperation, yearns to flee alongside the electronic department personnel from the power station. Yet, the stationed guard vehemently roars, impeding any thoughts of escape with an iron decree, "Nobody moves an inch until I give the order!" A fierce struggle ensues between Ali and the guard, culminating in a gunshot piercing Ali's arm. In the escalating skirmish, Ali's comrades attempt to apprehend the guard, but tragically, lives get extinguished within the swirling vortex of conflict.

Simultaneously, Persian special forces lance into combat against the resistant guards. Another contingent swiftly seizes vital documents while apprehending esteemed executives and select personnel, their authority engulfing the compound in an air of dominance.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
A few hours later, all of us, the hostess, some arrested
key personnel, and some important documents of the
complex, get lost in the air. And it seems that we have never
been there.
When the targeted country’s government is informed of
the intention of the incident, the Persian forces or their
agents are no longer there.

As hours unfold like a treacherous dream, a clandestine escape commences, whisking away the hostess, the detained key personnel, and crucial documents that hold the secrets of the complex. Elevated into the heavens, we fade away, vanishing as though we were never present within those hallowed grounds.

Through covert channels, the government of the targeted nation becomes apprised of the sinister plot that had unfolded. However, when they move to mount a response, to bring the Persian forces or their agents to justice, an unsettling reality dawns upon them – the perpetrators have evaporated into the ethereal mists of obscurity, leaving no trace of their ominous presence behind.

edit and improve the style of the excerpts from my sci-fi fantasy novel:
The next day, the targeted government summons the
Persian ambassador to their foreign ministry and threatens
to accuse Persia of the act of war and will submit the case
to the international court of law, while all the evidence in
hand is against them, and they know that.
Therefore, it should be better for them to declare that
they know nothing of what has been happening there.

With the dawn of a new day, the targeted government summons the Persian ambassador to their esteemed foreign ministry, whose chambers brim with a sense of gravity. In a resolute tone, the representatives of the nation issue a stern ultimatum, threatening to level accusations of a wanton act of war. They vow to take the case before the international court of law, armed with a wealth of damning evidence that firmly points the finger of blame towards Persia. 

Aware of the mounting evidence against them, the Persian ambassador stands upon a precipice, knowing the precarious position in which they find themselves. Realizing the potential dire consequences, they face a pivotal choice. It becomes increasingly apparent that their best course of action lies in disavowing all knowledge of the events that unfolded within the complex. By proclaiming ignorance, they may avert the impending storm that looms on the horizon.
